meta.title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Andrew Ng: Opening Keynote
meta.description:
Andrew Ng opened AI Dev 25 x NYC by discussing the rapid progress of AI, stating that the answer to whether AI is slowing down is no. 

AI has made software engineering more powerful and faster. Writing scalable software is about 50% faster, but building quick prototypes can be 10x or more faster. This acceleration allows teams to innovate by building many prototypes to see what sticks.

Andrew also addressed the broader sentiment on AI, noting that Americans are more concerned than excited about AI compared to other nations.  Despite the elevated level of concern, the good news is that people do want AI to help automate specific tasks, particularly repetitive ones or those that free up time for high-value work.

---------------

Join us at AI Dev 26 x San Francisco! Tickets: https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
